## What does this change?

A short description of the change and why it's needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance / refactor
- [ ] Security fix

## How was this tested?

Describe how you verified the change works — manual testing steps,
which browsers, whether you tested across two real devices/networks
(important for anything touching `peerConnection.js`, `transferEngine.js`,
or the signaling server).

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors or warnings
- [ ] No new `console.log` debug statements left in
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation (README/DEPLOYMENT) if behavior changed
- [ ] Tested a full transfer end-to-end (sender + receiver) if touching the transfer pipeline
